name: write-invocation
purpose: CLI and library for writing validated InvocationRecords to data/ecosystem-v2/invocations.jsonl — the ecosystem-audit skill invocation tracking mechanism
sanitize_fields: output file path: data/ecosystem-v2/invocations.jsonl is SoNash-specific; JASON-OS equivalent TBD
notes: Critical: consumed by 6+ ecosystem-audit skills via 'node dist/write-invocation.js --data'. Dual-mode: library export writeInvocation() + CLI. Auto-fills id/date/schema_version/completeness/origin defaults for legacy callers (T32 compatibility fix). Uses require.main===module guard for CLI entry. Writes to data/ecosystem-v2/invocations.jsonl via appendRecord.

consumers: ecosystem-audit skills (audit-agent-quality, brainstorm, create-audit, data-effectiveness-audit, deep-plan, document-analysis, health-ecosystem-audit, hook-ecosystem-audit, media-analysis, pr-retro, repo-analysis, script-ecosystem-audit, skill-audit, skill-creator, todo, website-analysis)

name: lib/schemas/shared
purpose: Zod BaseRecord schema shared by all 7 JSONL record types — defines id, date, schema_version, completeness, completeness_missing, origin fields
notes: Pure schema library — no SoNash-specific content. Origin.type enum: pr-review|pr-retro|backfill|migration|manual. CompletenessTier: full|partial|stub. Fully portable as schema contract.

name: lib/schemas/invocation
purpose: Zod schema for InvocationRecord — tracks skill/agent/team invocations with context fields for audit metrics
sanitize_fields: context.grade, context.mean_score, context.improvements, context.categories are pr-review-specific context fields
notes: Extends BaseRecord. Context sub-object has both pr-review fields (agents_audited, grade, mean_score) and skill-audit fields (target, decisions, score). tokens field has complex preprocessing to handle string/number/null coercion.

name: lib/schemas/review
purpose: Zod schema for ReviewRecord — tracks PR review findings with severity, patterns, learnings, per-round details
sanitize_fields: source field references SoNash archive files
notes: Extends BaseRecord. per_round_detail, rejection_analysis, ping_pong_chains fields are z.array(z.unknown()) — flexible containers for future round data. severity_breakdown is nested object.

name: lib/schemas/retro
purpose: Zod schema for RetroRecord — tracks PR retrospective analysis with wins, misses, process changes, action items, metrics
notes: Extends BaseRecord. action_items is structured array with status enum: implemented|deferred|blocked|rejected. score field 0-10.

name: lib/schemas/deferred-item
purpose: Zod schema for DeferredItemRecord — tracks review findings deferred for later resolution with severity, status lifecycle, promotion tracking
notes: Extends BaseRecord. Status lifecycle: open|resolved|promoted|wont-fix. Severity: S0-S3. promoted_to_debt boolean links to MASTER_DEBT.jsonl system.

name: lib/schemas/warning
purpose: Zod schema for WarningRecord — tracks system warnings and alerts with severity, lifecycle, and resolution tracking
notes: Extends BaseRecord. Lifecycle: new|acknowledged|resolved|stale. Severity: info|warning|error. source_script field records which script emitted the warning.

name: lib/schemas/learning-route
purpose: Zod schema for LearningRouteRecord — tracks learning lifecycle from discovery to enforcement (scaffolded→refined→enforced→verified)
sanitize_fields: scaffold field references SoNash-specific file paths
route enum (verified-pattern|hook-gate|lint-rule|claude-md-annotation) maps to SoNash enforcement mechanisms
notes: Uses .js extension in import (import from './shared.js') — unusual for TS file; indicates ESM compatibility shim. Uses .passthrough() for forward extension. Data flow comment: Writer=learning-router, Consumers=verify-enforcement, health checker, alerts.

name: lib/schemas/lifecycle-score
purpose: Zod schema for LifecycleScoreRecord — 4-dimension (capture/storage/recall/action) scoring system for data effectiveness audit (Wave 5.1)
sanitize_fields: category enum contains SoNash-specific system names (agent-tracking, velocity-tracking, etc.)
notes: Scores 0-3 per dimension, 0-12 total. Uses .passthrough(). category enum has 20 values covering all SoNash data systems. Connected to data-effectiveness-audit skill (Wave 5.1 program).

name: lib/schemas/index
purpose: Barrel export for all 7 JSONL schemas plus SCHEMA_MAP constant for dynamic schema lookup by file name
sanitize_fields: SCHEMA_MAP keys are SoNash file name slugs
notes: SCHEMA_MAP provides runtime schema registry for validate-jsonl-schemas.js. 7 schemas: reviews, retros, deferred-items, invocations, warnings, learning-routes, lifecycle-scores.

name: lib/write-jsonl
purpose: appendRecord() — validates a Zod-typed record and appends it atomically to a JSONL file with advisory locking and symlink guard
notes: Loads safe-fs.js via dynamic require with project-root resolution (so compiled dist/ still finds the CJS helper). Validates before writing — ZodError propagates to caller. Uses withLock advisory locking. mkdir recursive for new files. Portable if safe-fs.js is ported.

name: lib/read-jsonl
purpose: readValidatedJsonl<T>() — reads a JSONL file, validates each record against a Zod schema, returns valid/warnings split (never throws)
notes: Wraps scripts/lib/read-jsonl.js (CJS). Returns {valid: T[], warnings: string[]}. quiet option suppresses console.warn. Fail-open: returns empty array on missing file. Portable if read-jsonl.js is ported.

name: lib/completeness
purpose: hasField() and validateCompleteness() helpers — distinguish null-value from missing-field using completeness_missing array
notes: Pure utility — no external deps beyond TS types. Encodes the completeness tier contract: hasField returns false only when field is in completeness_missing (null = valid captured absence, not missing). Fully portable.

name: lib/enforcement-manifest
purpose: Zod schema and helpers for enforcement manifest records — maps CODE_PATTERNS.md entries to enforcement mechanisms (regex/ESLint/Semgrep/hooks/AI/manual)
sanitize_fields: mechanism types are SoNash-specific (sonash ESLint plugin, .semgrep/rules/, check-pattern-compliance.js)
coverage enum values portable but context is SoNash
notes: EnforcementRecordSchema: pattern_id, pattern_name, priority, category, mechanisms, coverage, status, last_verified. classifyCoverage() and isStale() are pure helpers. Used by build-enforcement-manifest.ts and verify-enforcement-manifest.ts.

name: lib/parse-review
purpose: Markdown-to-ReviewRecord parser handling heading-based, em-dash, and table archive formats; includes field extractors for PR, total, severity, patterns, learnings
sanitize_fields: source archive file paths are SoNash-specific
notes: 570 lines. KNOWN_SKIPPED_IDS has 64 entries — SoNash review history artifact. Three parsers: parseArchiveFile (heading), parseTableArchive (table), toV2ReviewRecord (builder). Complex regex patterns for PR/total/severity/pattern/learning extraction. parseSeverityCount uses string-ops not regex to avoid backtracking.

name: lib/promote-patterns
purpose: Full pattern promotion pipeline — detects recurrence in reviews.jsonl, filters already-promoted, inserts into CODE_PATTERNS.md by category, generates rule skeletons, updates consolidation state
sanitize_fields: CATEGORY_TO_SECTION map references SoNash CODE_PATTERNS.md section structure
notes: 638 lines. PIPE-05 + PIPE-06. Reads consolidation state from .claude/state/consolidation.json for idempotency. Has both library API (promotePatterns()) and CLI main(). detectRecurrence() is portable pure function. generateRuleSkeleton() generates JS/TS rule skeletons.

name: lib/generate-claude-antipatterns
purpose: PIPE-07: Updates CLAUDE.md Section 4 auto-managed region with top 6 recurring anti-patterns from reviews.jsonl using marker comments
sanitize_fields: <!-- AUTO-ANTIPATTERNS-START/END --> markers are SoNash CLAUDE.md conventions
notes: Not portable: hardcoded CLAUDE.md path and section structure. Uses atomic tmp+rename write. On first run wraps existing table with markers; subsequent runs replace between markers. Has --dry-run mode.

name: lib/generate-fix-template-stubs
purpose: PIPE-08: Appends fix template skeleton entries to FIX_TEMPLATES.md for newly promoted patterns not already present
notes: Idempotent: checks if pattern already has entry before appending. Uses atomic write with cross-drive fallback. Has --dry-run mode. Preview shows first stub only.

name: backfill-reviews
purpose: Idempotent one-time backfill orchestrator — parses 14 SoNash review archive files, resolves overlaps, migrates v1 state, extracts retrospectives, writes validated v2 JSONL to data/ecosystem-v2/
sanitize_fields: ARCHIVE_SOURCES array lists 14 SoNash-specific archive file paths
notes: 1029 lines — largest file in subsystem. 8-step orchestration: parse sources, resolve overlaps, extract retros, build retro records, migrate v1, check consolidation counter, apply pattern corrections, write output. BKFL-04/05/06 data corrections applied. runBackfill() is async. KNOWN_SKIPPED_IDS (64) and KNOWN_DUPLICATE_IDS (4) are SoNash archive artifacts. Not portable as-is — all paths are SoNash history.

name: build-enforcement-manifest
purpose: CLI that scans CODE_PATTERNS.md, regex rules, ESLint rules, and Semgrep rules to build per-pattern enforcement manifest JSONL
notes: Scans 4 sources: regex rules from check-pattern-compliance.js, ESLint from eslint-plugin-sonash, Semgrep from .semgrep/rules/, CLAUDE.md section 4. fuzzyMatch uses word-boundary + 60% threshold. Writes to data/ecosystem-v2/enforcement-manifest.jsonl. Output not in SCHEMA_MAP — separate schema.

name: verify-enforcement-manifest
purpose: Cross-references enforcement manifest against actual rule files to detect drift (missing rules + untracked rules); exits 1 on drift
sanitize_fields: Same 4 SoNash-specific source paths as build-enforcement-manifest.ts
notes: Companion verifier to build-enforcement-manifest.ts. Exit 0=PASS, 1=drift. Reports missing (manifest claims rule but doesn't exist) and untracked (rule exists but not in manifest). Uses safeParseLineWithError for error detail.

name: render-reviews-to-md
purpose: JSONL-to-markdown renderer — reads .claude/state/reviews.jsonl and regenerates the Active Reviews section of docs/AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md while preserving header/footer
sanitize_fields: section markers: ## Retrospectives, ## Active Reviews, ## Key Patterns are SoNash document structure
notes: 640 lines. Lenient parser (accepts pre-migration records without schema_version/completeness). Preserves header+footer via section marker split. Updates Document Health Monitoring metrics table inline. Supports --stdout, --filter-pr, --last, --input, --output CLI flags. Path traversal guard on --input/--output. Note: npm script 'reviews:render' calls this via npx tsx (NOT dist/).

name: write-review-record
purpose: CLI and library for writing validated ReviewRecords to .claude/state/reviews.jsonl with disposition integrity validation and auto-ID generation
sanitize_fields: output path: .claude/state/reviews.jsonl is SoNash state directory
notes: ID format: review-pr{N}-r{M} (canonical) or rev-{N} fallback. validateDispositionIntegrity() ensures fixed+deferred+rejected = total (Session #218 retro item). toPositiveInt() rejects floats/NaN/negatives. Version history comments in source.

name: write-retro-record
purpose: CLI and library for writing validated RetroRecords to .claude/state/retros.jsonl with auto-ID generation (retro-pr-{N})
sanitize_fields: output path: .claude/state/retros.jsonl is SoNash state directory
notes: Simpler than write-review-record.ts — no disposition integrity check. Auto-ID: retro-pr-{pr} if pr provided. Called by pr-retro skill.

name: write-deferred-items
purpose: CLI and library for creating DeferredItemRecords from review findings and appending to data/ecosystem-v2/deferred-items.jsonl
sanitize_fields: output path: data/ecosystem-v2/deferred-items.jsonl is SoNash ecosystem-v2 path
reviewId format validation: rev-\d+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)* is SoNash ID convention
notes: ID format: {reviewId}-deferred-{N}. findNextDeferredIndex scans existing file to avoid ID collision. CLI args: --review-id, --date, --items (JSON array). Called by pr-review skill deferred item tracking.

name: dedup-debt
purpose: Deduplicates review-sourced entries in MASTER_DEBT.jsonl by content_hash; syncs to raw/deduped.jsonl per MEMORY.md contract
notes: Pure dedup logic is exported and tested (dedupReviewSourced). Three source types: review, pr-review, pr-deferred. Keeps lowest DEBT-NNNN ID per content_hash group. Flags title+source near-duplicates without removing. Idempotent.

name: dedup-reviews
purpose: Resolves duplicate IDs in .claude/state/reviews.jsonl via 3 strategies (true-duplicate, progressive-update, namespace-collision); creates backup before modifying
sanitize_fields: rev-94 title backfill is SoNash-specific historical fix
notes: CJS JS file (not TS). Exports pure helpers for testing (contentSignature, weight, classifyGroup, etc.). Uses module.exports for test access. --dry-run flag. Creates .bak backup. refuseSymlinkWithParents from security-helpers. backfillMissingTitle for rev-94 is one-time historical fix.

name: compute-changelog-metrics
purpose: Computes PR changelog metrics (fix rate, per-round breakdown) from retros.jsonl + reviews.jsonl source data to prevent manual arithmetic errors
notes: CJS JS file. No exports — pure CLI consumer. Reads legacy .claude/state/ paths (not data/ecosystem-v2/). Created per PR #414 retro to prevent manual percentage calculation errors. Uses --pr N filter.

name: validate-jsonl-schemas
purpose: Validates all JSONL files in .claude/state/ against compiled Zod schemas from dist/lib/schemas/index.js; reports schema drift
sanitize_fields: requires dist/ to exist (must run tsc first)
notes: CJS JS file. Requires pre-compiled dist/lib/schemas/index.js. Contains path containment check. Reports unmapped JSONL files. Created per PR #395 retro (DEBT-11312). Note: validates .claude/state/ but backfill writes to data/ecosystem-v2/ — these are DIFFERENT directories, a dual-path data split.

name: tsconfig.json
purpose: TypeScript compiler config for scripts/reviews/ subsystem — compiles TS to CJS CommonJS to dist/
notes: extends ../../tsconfig.json. outDir: ./dist. module: commonjs. target: ES2019. declaration: true. noEmit: false. Includes lib/**/*.ts, *.ts, __tests__/**/*.ts. Excludes node_modules, dist.
